title: Anna McMorrin MP — Meet Me
text_excerpt: Anna McMorrin MP — Meet Me 0 Skip to Content Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Meet Me I hold regular events across Cardiff North, where constituents can tell me about any issues or concerns they may have. Advice surgeries, where I can give you advice on personal issues Coffee mornings which are more informal group discussions If you would like to attend my next surgery or coffee morning, please fill out the form at the bottom of this page. Promoted by Anna McMorrin at 17 Plasnewydd, CF14 1NR.
